chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-228 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 1037/24 2.For orders on o/objection. 3.For orders on CMA 945/24 4.For orders on CMA 946/24 5.For hearing of main case. 06-03-2024 Mr. Abdul Salam Memon, Advocate for petitioners. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2. One week’s time is granted for compliance of office objections. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. Learned counsel submits that petitioners have been admitted in Khairpur Medical College (KMC) as new entrants for the batch pertaining to the year 2023-2024 on the basis of their qualification in MDCAT and intermediate score under recommendations of PMDC through a centralized system. Since the issue of final registration of KMC is still pending and in past when various petitions were filed by the students, PMDC was directed by this Court to grant KMC a provisional registration / recognition; hence it is functioning with full strength currently. It is case of the petitioners that despite being admitted in KMC under the recommendation of PMDC, the PMDC is not opening portal of the college so that list of petitioners could be uploaded on the relevant site as a final recognition of their admission in the medical college to be pursued by running of classes etc. Pending final recognition of medical college, PMDC has issued a letter, impugned here, dated 03.01.2024, 2 whereby an impression has been given that the registration of KMC would start afresh in terms of section 21 of PMDC, Act, 2022 although this exercise has already been completed and all the preliminary requirements have been fulfilled.

It is case of the petitioners that despite being admitted in KMC under the recommendation of PMDC, the PMDC is not opening portal of the college so that list of petitioners could be uploaded on the relevant site as a final recognition of their admission in the medical college to be pursued by running of classes etc. Pending final recognition of medical college, PMDC has issued a letter, impugned here, dated 03.01.2024, 2 whereby an impression has been given that the registration of KMC would start afresh in terms of section 21 of PMDC, Act, 2022 although this exercise has already been completed and all the preliminary requirements have been fulfilled. In any case, let notice be issued to respondents as well as DAG and AAG for 16.04.2024. Meanwhile, respondent-PMDC shall open portal of KMC in respect of new admissions of students pertaining to 2023-2024 batch of the students. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
